title: KeepRGBRatio Property
description: Sets / gets whether to maintain the ratio between R, G, B for the ColorStretch operation.
notes:
For the ImageOp ColorStretch operation, KeepRGBRatio sets whether to maintain the ratio between R, B, G values when performing the stretch.  When KeepRGB is false, the R. G, and B values are stretched individually.

See Also: KeepRGBRatio Property
